parameters.formDescription: input_mode=form_upload thi upload file/text. input_mode=drive_url thi cung cap full Google Drive URL.

parameters.batchSize: ={{ (() => { const n = Number($json.tts_parallelism ?? 2); if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n < 1) return 2; return Math.min(20, Math.floor(n)); })() }}

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const base = String($json.tts_api_base_url || "http://127.0.0.1:8001").trim().replace(/\/$/, ""); return /\/stream$/i.test(base) ? base : base + "/stream"; })() }}
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const chunk = $json.media_chunks && typeof $json.media_chunks === "object" ? $json.media_chunks : $json; return { text: String(chunk.text ?? ""), voice_id: String($json.tts_voice_id ?? "ngochuyen"), temperature: Number($json.tts_temperature ?? 0.8), top_k: Number($json.tts_top_k ?? 50), max_chars: Number($json.tts_max_chars ?? 256), silence_p: Number($json.tts_silence_p ?? 0.05), crossfade_p: Number($json.tts_crossfade_p ?? 0.03), request_id: String($json.request_id ?? ""), chunk_key: String(chunk.chunk_key ?? "") }; })() }}

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const statusUrl = String($json.tts_status_url || "").trim(); if (statusUrl) return statusUrl; const base = String($json.tts_api_base_url || "http://127.0.0.1:8001").trim().replace(/\/$/, ""); const jobId = String($json.tts_job_id || "").trim(); return jobId ? base + "/jobs/" + encodeURIComponent(jobId) : base + "/jobs"; })() }}

parameters.content:
## INPUT CONTRACT

Core input:
`input_mode` (`form_upload|drive_url`)
`drive_file_url`
`input_text` / `text` / `content`
`chunk_manifest` hoặc `media_chunks` hoặc `review_manifest.scenes`

TTS runtime params:
`tts_api_base_url`, `tts_voice_id`, `tts_temperature`, `tts_top_k`, `tts_max_chars`, `tts_silence_p`, `tts_crossfade_p`, `tts_timeout_ms`, `tts_parallelism`, `tts_poll_interval_seconds`, `tts_poll_max_attempts`

Main output:
`status`, `items`, `error_reason`
Binary output:
file audio được trả lại trên item output cuối, workflow cha tự quyết định upload/lưu tiếp.

## STAGE 1: NORMALIZE INPUT

Nodes:
- Set Config
- Normalize Inputs
- If Needs Drive Download / Build Chunks From Drive File

Goal:
- gom các nguồn input thành `media_chunks`
- set flags `media_should_run`, `needs_drive_download`
- chỉ giữ contract cần cho việc generate TTS, không tự lo side-effect downstream.

## STAGE 2: GENERATE + POLL LOOP

Flow:
- Split Out Media Chunks
- Loop Over TTS Chunks
- Create TTS Audio
- Normalize TTS Response
- If TTS Poll Required -> Wait -> Get TTS Job Status (loop)

Mục tiêu: tạo voice per chunk với timeout/poll có giới hạn.

## STAGE 3: FINALIZE OUTPUT

Nodes:
- Finalize TTS Results

Kết quả:
- tổng hợp `media_tts_items`
- set `status=success|partial_failed|failed`
- gom binary voice theo key để workflow cha tự upload/lưu tiếp nếu cần.
